title: Extract Magic Numbers to Constants
summary:
Extracted all magic numbers to named constants across all modules:

- tui.lua: MAX_COLORSCHEMES = 200 (committed: cf75414)
- init.lua: DEFAULT_REFRESH_TIME documented (committed: cf75414)
- schedule.lua: MINUTES_PER_DAY = 1440 (coordinated with JadeViper in commit: cdcc911)
- core.lua: MS_PER_MINUTE = 60000 (committed: 7202f22)

All 84 tests pass. No bare magic numbers remain (except 0, 1 for indexing).
